ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "restaurant_name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "object_key" TEXT /* Unique object key for the restaurant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the restaurant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "restaurant_url" TEXT /* URL of the restaurant's page on Yelp or other platforms */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the restaurant's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the restaurant's location */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* Operational hours of the restaurant */,
  "cuisine_type" TEXT /* Type of cuisine served */,
  "avg_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the restaurant */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the restaurant */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles of the restaurant */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the restaurant */,
  "parking_info" TEXT /* Parking information of the restaurant */,
  "accessibility_features" TEXT /* Accessibility features of the restaurant */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification of the restaurant (e.g., Michelin star) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_cuisine_type FOREIGN KEY ("cuisine_type") REFERENCES cuisine_types ("cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menus" (
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant the menu belongs to */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the menu item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of menu item (e.g., appetizer, main course, dessert) */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* Category of the menu item (e.g., vegetarian, gluten-free) */,
  "item_ingredients" TEXT /* Ingredients used in the menu item */,
  "item_nutrition" TEXT /* Nutritional information of the menu item (JSON format) */,
  "item_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the menu item's image */,
  "calorie_count" INTEGER /* Calorie count of the menu item */,
  "allergen_info" TEXT /* Allergen information for the menu item */,
  "cooking_method" TEXT /* Cooking method for the menu item */,
  "dish_description" TEXT /* Description of the dish */,
  "popularity_rating" REAL /* Popularity rating of the menu item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menus_item_category FOREIGN KEY ("item_category") REFERENCES menu_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menus_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menus_item_type FOREIGN KEY ("item_type") REFERENCES menu_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_tier" TEXT /* Loyalty tier of the customer (e.g., bronze, silver, gold) */,
  "dietary_restrictions" TEXT /* Dietary restrictions of the customer */,
  "preferred_cuisine_types" TEXT /* Preferred cuisine types of the customer */,
  "preferred_dining_style" TEXT /* Preferred dining style of the customer (e.g., formal, casual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_loyalty_tier FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_tier") REFERENCES loyalty_tiers ("tier_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the reservation */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant where the reservation is made */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date of the reservation */,
  "reservation_time" TEXT /* Time of the reservation */,
  "party_size" INTEGER /* Number of people in the party */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Special requests for the reservation */,
  "cancellation_policy" TEXT /* Cancellation policy of the reservation */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method for the reservation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the transaction */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant where the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, refunded) */,
  "order_details" TEXT /* Details of the items ordered in the transaction */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant the campaign is for */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_description" TEXT /* Description of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  "target_audience_demographics" TEXT /* Target audience demographics for the campaign */,
  "promotion_channels" TEXT /* Promotion channels used for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant the review is for */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "helpfulness_rating" REAL /* Helpfulness rating of the review */,
  "date_of_visit" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cuisine_types" (
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cuisine type */,
  "cuisine_name" TEXT /* Name of the cuisine type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cuisine type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_tiers" (
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty tier */,
  "tier_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty tier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty tier */,
  "required_points" INTEGER /* Number of points required to reach this tier */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits associated with this tier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction item */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the menu item ordered */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the menu item */,
  "item_discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the menu item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_items_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_items_menu_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_id") REFERENCES menus ("menu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_transactions" (
  "loyalty_transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned from the transaction */,
  "points_spent" INTEGER /* Points spent on the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_transactions_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)
